title: This code stalls instead of erroring

features.name: combinational loop with negated signals
features.description: Code should include continuous assignments where two output signals depend on each other's negations, creating a combinational loop
features.snippet:
assign heater = (mode && too_cold) || (fan_on && !aircon);
assign aircon = (!mode && too_hot) || (fan_on && !heater);
